data.body: Fix applied: (1) _flock_stage_commit now probes for util-linux flock via --version grep; non-util-linux (BusyBox) leaves _flock_bin empty → mkdir fallback. (2) GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM=1 added to both write_commit_event git rev-parse calls. RED test test-flock-busybox-compat.sh confirms GREEN.
